title: Insight AI dashboard mockup — visibility test + visual upsell
html:
Companion to the same-evening Insight AI funnel sketch — a visual-dashboard layout pairing the Business Visibility Test with a Competitor Visibility Test, gated by an "Unlock for $X/month" upsell. Reuses the $14.99 / $99 / $500–1000 tier ladder, with a teaser metric: "X amount of people in your area searched for your service type today."

TL;DR

  • insight ai dashboard wireframe — twin Business + Competitor visibility tests, four free includes (individual user count, aggregated daily, area count, area-search-volume teaser), then unlock paywall.
  • "Visual upsell" pattern made explicit — show value before asking for card, then 14-day trial.
  • This is the second half of the same Oct-23 design session as 2025 10 23 screenshot 2025 10 23 at 7 33 39 pm 5fd5798f — funnel + dashboard together = the insight ai product spec as of late October.

insight ai · aeo agency · ai visibility engine · ai search optimization · scoreapp · peekaboo
